name: Jaeger
research_note: kingshotwiki.com/heroes/jaeger 404'd — used Perplexity API synthesis as fallback secondary source. Below 2-primary-source standard for most fields.

base_stats.notable: New highest Conquest Attack documented (4045, exceeds Marlin's 3235).

conquest.name: Fatal Attraction
conquest.description: Deals damage to enemies in the target area and stuns them for 2 seconds.

conquest.name: Game of Chance
conquest.description: A hit-or-miss skill: on hit, deals heavy damage. On miss, restores the TARGET's health by 50% of Jaeger's Attack (unique punish-on-miss mechanic).
conquest.unique_mechanic_note: Only hero with a skill that heals the enemy on miss. High risk/reward design.

conquest.name: Rumormonger
conquest.description: Increases damage taken by enemies for 3 seconds.

expedition.name: The Tempest
expedition.description: Chance to boost squad damage by 40% for 3 turns.

expedition.name: The Resistance
expedition.description: 20% chance to reduce enemy squads' Lethality for 2 turns.

expedition.name: The Celebration
expedition.description: A rousing song unlocks new reserves of strength. Increases the total Squad's Health.
expedition.scaling_note: Perplexity: '25%' cited without full scaling array. Likely 5/10/15/20/25% following the standard squad Health buff pattern, but not directly confirmed.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Sound of Silence
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Silences and prevents the target from using skills, dealing damage. Unlocked only when Wanderwail is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Hymn to Survival
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Health of defender troops. Unlocked only when Wanderwail is equipped.

order: Game of Chance for buff procs
Exclusive gear Sound of Silence for arena

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard archer archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Jaeger's Rumormonger damage-amp debuff plus Sound of Silence's skill lockout make him disruptive against skill-reliant enemy compositions. Community YouTube reviews describe him as 'overrated' given his 20% proc chances limit reliability.
best_partners.source: kingshotguides.com + lootbar.gg + kingshotmastery.com (community consensus lineup guides)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js marks Jaeger as F2P=false. Acquisition methods include multiple F2P routes. Same 'available but not practically F2P-viable' pattern as Hilde/Eric/Rosa.

garrison.reasoning: Garrison-oriented archer who strengthens defensive lineups.

lore_background.title: The Siren's Call Archer
lore_background.backstory: A Gen 3 Legendary Archer whose attacks are described as evoking a siren's call or commanding melodies — his style built around psychological warfare alongside raw damage. Full backstory not available in consulted sources (kingshotwiki page unavailable).
lore_background.incomplete_lore_note: Lore is thinner than other heroes because the primary lore source (kingshotwiki) was 404 for Jaeger.

deep_analysis: Jaeger is the disruption archer of Gen 3 — a Legendary with the highest base Conquest Attack of any documented hero (4045). His kit is built around punishing enemy coordination: Fatal Attraction deals up to Attack × 224% AOE with a 2-second stun, Game of Chance is a unique hit-or-miss skill that deals up to Attack × 300% damage when it connects but heals the target by 50% of Jaeger's Attack when it misses (high risk/reward), and Rumormonger amplifies enemy damage taken by up to 30% for 3 seconds. His Expedition tree adds squad-level disruption: The Tempest has up to a 40% chance to boost squad damage by 40% for 3 turns, and The Resistance has a 20% chance per attack to reduce enemy squad Lethality by up to 50% for 2 turns. His exclusive gear Wanderwail adds +764 Attack (highest exclusive-gear Attack bonus documented), +630 Defense, +4725 Health, +70% Lethality, +70% Health, and unlocks two more skills: Sound of Silence (silences enemies for up to 5 seconds while dealing up to 300% Attack damage — unique skill lockout mechanic) and Hymn to Survival (+15% defender troops' Health). heroes.js tier: S-tier Garrison, B-tier elsewhere. YouTube community reviews describe him as 'overrated' because the 20% proc chances on his best Expedition skills limit reliability. He's premium-gated per heroes.js despite multiple F2P access routes (Strongest Governor, Daily Deals, Hero Rally, Kingdom of Power, Swordland Shop). Lore is thin — his kingshotwiki page wasn't available, so only fragments describing him as a 'siren's call' archer with commanding melodies and psychological-warfare flavor survived the research pass.
unverified_fields: kingshotwiki 404 — used Perplexity fallback, below 2-primary-source standard
The Celebration scaling — incomplete (only 25% max cited, full scaling array inferred not confirmed)
Hymn to Survival — single primary source (kingshot-data)
Lore is thin — kingshotwiki lore source not accessible
f2p_investment — heroes.js false vs multiple F2P pools. Interpretation conflict.

effect_op_codes.description: Gen 3 defensive archer — likely 111 but not confirmed by Handbook title
